proposed_domain: Saami / cross-country differential ski wax (glide wax on tip+tail for low kinetic friction + grip wax in foot-zone for needed static friction; spatially separated zones on same ski; temperature-conditioned)

closest_prior_match.verdict: DISTINCT — batik is wax-as-resist for dyeing; ski wax is wax-as-friction-modulator. Different mechanism class.
